Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Merge fizzah/420: Zoom integration, speaker diarization, meeting analysis

New features from fizzah/420 branch:
- Zoom OAuth 2.0 integration \(connect, callback, webhook, token refresh\)
- Zoom webhook handlers: meeting.ended → AWAITING_UPLOAD, recording.completed → auto-process
- Speaker diarization service \(3-tier: pyannote → AssemblyAI → LLM fallback\)
- Meeting analysis service with context classification per speaker segment
- AI prompts service for structured meeting summaries
- Updated meeting pipeline: transcribe → diarize → context-analyse → summarise
- New endpoints: POST /meetings/{id}/upload, PATCH /meetings/{id}/speaker-names, GET /meetings/{id}/export
- Diarization UI in meeting detail page with speaker color coding and editable names
- Zoom integration settings UI with OAuth flow
- DB migration 004_add_zoom_integration \(zoom_meeting_id, zoom_recording_id, diarized_transcript, speaker_names\)
- Updated TypeScript types: DiarizedSegment, ContextType, Zoom fields on Meeting/ActionItem/Integration
- Config vars: HUGGINGFACE_TOKEN, ASSEMBLYAI_API_KEY, ZOOM_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/REDIRECT/WEBHOOK

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
